2606.01300.title: ChronosAD: Leveraging Time Series Foundation Models for Accurate Anomaly Detection
2606.01300.paper_summary: Time series anomaly detection is a crucial task in various domains, including finance, healthcare, and industry. However, existing methods often struggle to generalize across different datasets, especially when anomalies are subtle or context-dependent. To solve this issue, we introduce ChronosAD, a novel architecture for anomaly detection that uses a time series foundation model as a feature extractor. Specifically, it employs a two-stage pipeline: first, it uses the foundation model to extract embeddings for each time series in a zero-shot manner. Then, a custom-developed Temporal Block, composed of Bidirectional Long Short-Term Memory (BiLSTM) and Multi-Head Attention, refines these embeddings to capture temporal dependencies and highlight salient patterns. Unlike previous approaches, our model requires minimal task-specific tuning and demonstrates robust generalization across a wide range of domains, including industrial, medical, cyber-physical, and automotive systems. Extensive experiments on 11 benchmarks show that ChronosAD outperforms existing methods by 4.72% in AUC and 6.60% in AP on average. The source code is available at https://github.com/intelligolabs/ChronosAD.
2606.01300.paper_summary_zh: 時間序列異常檢測是各個領域中的一項關鍵任務，包括金融、醫療保健和工業。<lb/>然而，現有的方法在不同數據集之間的泛化能力往往存在困難，尤其是在異常情況微妙或依賴於上下文的情況下。<lb/>為了解決這個問題，我們提出了ChronosAD，一種新穎的異常檢測架構，利用時間序列基礎模型作為特徵提取器。<lb/>具體而言，它採用兩階段的流程：首先，使用基礎模型以零樣本的方式為每個時間序列提取嵌入。<lb/>然後，一個自定義開發的時間塊，包含雙向長短期記憶（BiLSTM）和多頭注意力，進一步精煉這些嵌入，以捕捉時間依賴性並突出顯著模式。<lb/>與之前的方法不同，我們的模型只需最小的任務特定調整，並在包括工業、醫療、網絡物理和汽車系統等廣泛領域中顯示出強大的泛化能力。<lb/>在11個基準上的廣泛實驗顯示，ChronosAD在AUC上平均超越現有方法4.72%，在AP上超越6.60%。<lb/>源代碼可在https://github.com/intelligolabs/ChronosAD獲得。
2606.01300.author: Uzair Khan et.al.
2606.01300.authors: Uzair Khan, Luigi Capogrosso, Francesco Biondani, Michele Magno, Franco Fummi, Francesco Setti, Marco Cristani
